notes: fixture session: deep broker fail — debug_gdb_commands traced write primitive and reuse pivot but broker escape blocked by seccomp filter on cross-process IPC

debug_gdb_commands traced the OOB-write from the renderer leak into a UAF in the shared memory region, confirming the write primitive. info-leak skill recovered the renderer-side heap base via uninitialized stack read, enabling the reuse-pivot to redirect a stale IPC callback. However, the broker enforces a seccomp filter that blocks the pivoted IPC call — the sandbox policy denies the specific syscall needed for cross-process broker escape.
